chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ مِنَ الثِّيَابِ لِلْكَفَنِ وَ مَا يُكْرَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – What is recommended from the clothes for the shroud and what is disliked

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/318)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/318)

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Get the best shrouds for your dead ones, for these are their adornments’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Prepare good quality shroud for your deceased ones; it is beautification for them.’”
